laundry_hours.title: Configure Laundry Opening Hours
laundry_hours.description:
Set when the laundry opens and closes. This is used to display 'Closed until XX:XX' on machines.

Current: Opens {current_opening}, Closes {current_closing}

data_description.opening_time: When does the laundry open (format: HH:MM)
data_description.closing_time: When does the laundry close (format: HH:MM)
